title: I found Atlantis - Requested by Jim

enrichment.summary: Kyle presents his personal theory that Atlantis was located in the Bahamas, specifically around Andros Island, using measurements from Plato's Timaeus and Critias, Google Earth observations (now depixelated), and passages from Herodotus to argue the location matches ancient descriptions. He argues against the popular Richat Structure theory and claims to have identified the Temple of Poseidon and city layout on the ocean floor before the Navy or Google obscured the imagery.
enrichment.speaker: kyle
topics: Herodotus and ancient circumnavigation of Africa

stances.position: Atlantis was in the Bahamas near Andros Island, not the Richat Structure in Africa
Should be read as literal history, not metaphor or myth
Ancient Greeks and Egyptians understood the world accurately, including the Atlantic Ocean and circumnavigation of Africa
Egyptian civilization was founded and owned by Atlanteans, explaining its unique culture
The Navy deliberately obscured the Atlantis site, which is suspicious and supports his find
Had bigger brains and were likely smarter than modern humans
Comets and floods have repeatedly destroyed civilizations throughout history
